emails.subject: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") Cheryl: Enron Credit Inc. a Delaware corporation, has been created for U.S. debt trading currently handled by ENA. As a result, ENA will need to transfer its brokerage debt positions to Enron Credit Inc. accounts with those brokers. The brokers include our favorites: Bear Stearns Companies Morgan Stanley Co. Inc. Goldman Sachs Co. ENA will need to assign its positions by the end of February, 2001. Richard Sage (London office) will need to see the "sample package" (unanimous consent, authorized trader list). Will you please see that an email is sent to Richard with this information? We should begin the documentation now. Let me know if you have any questions. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Cheryl: Sheila can print out a listing of instruments to be assigned to each new Enron Credit Inc. account. The portfolio includes high-risk, high yield instruments. We should contact the brokers today or tomorrow for the form of agreements. Why don't you ask Stephanie or Sam to prepare three sets of assignments? They should coordinate with Sheila to identify the attachment. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 02/15/2001 08:52 AM Sheila Glover 02/15/2001 08:09 AM

emails.subject: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") Cheryl: Can you please forward a copy of the ECI resolution(s) (or consent) which was used to establish the Bear account and Securites Loan Agreement? We need to determine all products authorized for ECI trading. Also, copies of Enron Credit Limited authorizations would be useful. Thanks for your help. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") Tom, I am now faxing a copy to you and forwarding a copy to Sara. Sara, Tom would like us both to call him to discuss further whether we can construe that "repos" as included in the definition of products set forth in the Consent. I told Tom, yes, I would believe so. But we would like to conference you in to doublecheck. So hopefully you are available in next few minutes. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/12/2001 09:22 AM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI") Tom, I am now faxing a copy to you and forwarding a copy to Sara. Sara, Tom would like us both to call him to discuss further whether we can construe that "repos" as included in the definition of products set forth in the Consent. I told Tom, yes, I would believe so. But we would like to conference you in to doublecheck. So hopefully you are available in next few minutes. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 04/12/2001 09:22 AM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Credit Inc. ("ECI")
emails.body: Sara, As a courtesy, Bear Stearns permitted us to open the Prime Broker Account without receipt of the resolutions provided that we sent them under separate cover. This was necessary because I needed to get more firm approval on the slate of officers that Richard Sage had communicated to me and Stephanie. The question of whether the consents were drafted to provide for Repos is new to me since I do not recall that you and I discuss this during the process of opening the accounts. However, in any case, if necessary, we could easily and quickly edit the resolutions today and send them overnight to Bear to make explicit that we would want to use Bear for financing any repos. Again, I am not sure if this is what we want to do since we have not discussed it, but let me know. If I can be of any further assistance today, let me know. I had planned to leave at 5:30 p.m. but can rearrange my schedule if you need any help with any thing. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Forwarded by Cheryl Nelson/NA/Enron on 04/16/2001 03:24 PM Tom Doukas 04/16/2001 08:55 AM
